parameters.jsonBody: ={ "statements": [{ "statement": "MATCH (e:Event) RETURN e.apt AS apt, count(e) AS cnt" }] }

parameters.jsCode:
// Format URL data for Neo4j write
const meta = $('Split IOCs in Batches').first().json;
const enriched = $input.first().json;

return [{
  event_id: meta.event_id,
  event_name: meta.event_name,
  apt_label: meta.apt_label,
  nation_state: meta.nation_state || '',
  attribution_tier: meta.attribution_tier || 1,
  url: meta.ioc,
  extracted_domain: enriched.extracted_domain || '',
  path: enriched.path || '',
  tld: enriched.tld || '',
  length: enriched.length || 0,
  digit_count: enriched.digit_count || 0,
  special_char_count: enriched.special_char_count || 0,
  path_depth: enriched.path_depth || 0,
  has_query: enriched.has_query || false,
  has_fragment: enriched.has_fragment || false,
  entropy: enriched.entropy || 0.0,
  file_extension: enriched.file_extension || '',
  http_status: enriched.http_status,
  content_type: enriched.content_type || '',
  server: enriched.server || '',
  head_failed: enriched.head_failed !== undefined ? enriched.head_failed : true,
  resolved_ip: enriched.resolved_ip
}];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "statements": [
    {
      "statement": "MERGE (e:Event {id: $event_id}) SET e.apt = $apt_label, e.nation_state = $nation_state, e.attribution_tier = $attribution_tier, e.type = 'Report', e.name = $event_name MERGE (u:URL {value: $url}) SET u.domain = $extracted_domain, u.path = $path, u.tld = $tld, u.length = $length, u.digit_count = $digit_count, u.special_char_count = $special_char_count, u.path_depth = $path_depth, u.has_query = $has_query, u.has_fragment = $has_fragment, u.entropy = $entropy, u.file_extension = $file_extension, u.http_status = $http_status, u.content_type = $content_type, u.server = $server, u.head_failed = $head_failed MERGE (e)-[:InReport]->(u) WITH u, $extracted_domain AS dom, $resolved_ip AS rip WHERE dom IS NOT NULL AND dom <> '' MERGE (d:Domain {value: dom}) MERGE (u)-[:HostedOn]->(d) WITH u, rip WHERE rip IS NOT NULL AND rip <> '' MERGE (ip:IP {value: rip}) MERGE (u)-[:ResolvesTo]->(ip)",
      "parameters": {
        "event_id": $json.event_id,
        "event_name": $json.event_name,
        "apt_label": $json.apt_label,
        "nation_state": $json.nation_state,
        "attribution_tier": $json.attribution_tier,
        "url": $json.url,
        "extracted_domain": $json.extracted_domain,
        "path": $json.path,
        "tld": $json.tld,
        "length": $json.length,
        "digit_count": $json.digit_count,
        "special_char_count": $json.special_char_count,
        "path_depth": $json.path_depth,
        "has_query": $json.has_query,
        "has_fragment": $json.has_fragment,
        "entropy": $json.entropy,
        "file_extension": $json.file_extension,
        "http_status": $json.http_status,
        "content_type": $json.content_type,
        "server": $json.server,
        "head_failed": $json.head_failed
      }
    }
  ]
} }}

={{ {
  "statements": [
    {
      "statement": "MERGE (e:Event {id: $event_id}) SET e.apt = $apt_label, e.nation_state = $nation_state, e.attribution_tier = $attribution_tier, e.type = 'Report', e.name = $event_name MERGE (d:Domain {value: $domain}) SET d.tld = $tld, d.length = $length, d.digit_count = $digit_count, d.period_count = $period_count, d.entropy = $entropy, d.is_nxdomain = $is_nxdomain, d.active_period_days = $active_period_days, d.a_count = $a_count, d.aaaa_count = $aaaa_count, d.mx_count = $mx_count, d.ns_count = $ns_count, d.soa_count = $soa_count, d.txt_count = $txt_count, d.cname_count = $cname_count, d.ptr_count = $ptr_count, d.srv_count = $srv_count MERGE (e)-[:InReport]->(d) WITH d, $asn AS asn_num, $asn_description AS asn_desc, $country AS country WHERE asn_num IS NOT NULL AND asn_num <> '' MERGE (a:ASN {number: asn_num}) SET a.description = asn_desc, a.country = country",
      "parameters": {
        "event_id": $json.event_id,
        "event_name": $json.event_name,
        "apt_label": $json.apt_label,
        "nation_state": $json.nation_state,
        "attribution_tier": $json.attribution_tier,
        "domain": $json.domain,
        "tld": $json.tld,
        "length": $json.length,
        "digit_count": $json.digit_count,
        "period_count": $json.period_count,
        "entropy": $json.entropy,
        "is_nxdomain": $json.is_nxdomain,
        "active_period_days": $json.active_period_days,
        "a_count": $json.a_count,
        "aaaa_count": $json.aaaa_count,
        "mx_count": $json.mx_count,
        "ns_count": $json.ns_count,
        "soa_count": $json.soa_count,
        "txt_count": $json.txt_count,
        "cname_count": $json.cname_count,
        "ptr_count": $json.ptr_count,
        "srv_count": $json.srv_count,
        "asn": $json.asn,
        "asn_description": $json.asn_description,
        "country": $json.country
      }
    }
  ]
} }}
